name: Letnia Szkola Kognitywistyki
scope: Polish-language Poland source for cognitive science summer school records.
language_policy: Polish-language sources are allowed only for Poland.
risk_notes: WordPress structure is extractable, but registration link points to a short URL and must not be followed blindly for scraping.

name: IJCAI-ECAI / EurAI ECAI
scope: Flagship AI conference family; include Europe-hosted editions only.
language_policy: English official pages only unless edition-specific local pages are approved.
risk_notes: Joint branding can create duplicate IJCAI/ECAI records.

name: ECML PKDD
scope: European machine learning and data mining conference.
risk_notes: Historical year pages may move across domains.

name: ACM CHI Europe editions
scope: HCI flagship; include Europe-hosted or European-institution online editions only.
risk_notes: Global rotating event; non-European editions must be excluded.

name: AIES
scope: AI ethics and society conference; include Europe-hosted editions only.
risk_notes: Main call and student calls may live on separate pages.

name: FENS Forum and FENS meetings
scope: European neuroscience and cognitive neuroscience adjacency.
risk_notes: Source availability should be retried politely; include only relevant neuroscience/cognition events.

name: ECNP Congress
scope: European brain research and neuropsychopharmacology conference family.
risk_notes: Clinical scope can be too broad; cognition/neurotechnology relevance should be tagged explicitly.

name: ESCoP meetings
risk_notes: Biennial or irregular edition pages need stale-page detection.

name: EACL / ACL Europe-hosted editions
scope: Computational linguistics and NLP; include EACL and Europe-hosted ACL editions.
risk_notes: ACL main conference rotates globally; Europe filter is mandatory.

name: SIGCHI specialist conferences
scope: UMAP, RecSys, IUI, HRI, ICMI and related HCI/AI interaction venues, with Europe filter.
risk_notes: Too broad without a per-venue allowlist; each annual site needs separate approval.
